16 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB 2: BONES AND BONE MARKINGS HUMAN ANATOMY LAB MANUAL 17

18 MALGOSIA WILK-BLASZCZAK

LAB 2: BONES AND BONE MARKINGS MEASURABLE OUTCOMES • Determine if a given bone is part of the axial or appendicular skeleton. • Ascertain the major bones of the skull, as well as any markings or unique features, the regions of the vertebral column, parts of a typical vertebra, along with the other bones and features of the axial skeleton. • Identify the bones of the appendicular skeleton and their unique features. • Designate bones as either left or right when applicable. Examples include the ulna, humerus, femurs, scapulas, and
